modules.name: structure_contribution_and_fit
modules.rationale: Core manuscript structure review is always required.

modules.name: bibliography_metadata_validation
modules.rationale: Bibliography structure must be inspected before agent reasoning.

modules.name: statistical_validity_and_assumptions
modules.rationale: Applied or data-science manuscripts require statistical validity review.

modules.name: math_proofs_and_notation
modules.rationale: Activated when proof-oriented mathematical content is present.

modules.name: results_figures_tables_consistency
modules.rationale: Activated when the manuscript references figures or tables.

modules.name: reproducibility_and_computational_audit
modules.rationale: Activated for software and workflow dissemination papers.

modules.name: ai_generated_manuscript_risk_audit
modules.rationale: Dedicated AI-risk review remains part of the default stack.
